Post.title: Post
Post.description: An anonymous message posted by a user.

content.description: The text content of the post (max 500 chars).

authorName.description: The random anonymous username of the poster.

likes.description: Number of likes/reactions on the post.

authorId.description: A unique semi-anonymous ID for the author (e.g. from localStorage) to handle mutations.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image uploaded with the post.

Reply.title: Reply
Reply.description: An anonymous reply to a post.

likes.description: Number of likes on the reply.

/posts/{postId}/replies/{replyId}.description: Nested anonymous replies to a specific post.
